top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > (SELECT AVG(UA) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > 7.0; -- Assuming abnormal uric acid count is above 7.0 mg/dL (typical threshold)

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > (SELECT AVG(UA) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > 7.0;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > 7.0; -- Assuming abnormal uric acid count is above 7.0 mg/dL (typical threshold)

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > (SELECT AVG(UA) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA < 2.5 OR l.UA > 7.0; -- Using both below and above typical normal range as abnormal

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > 7.0;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA > (SELECT AVG(UA) FROM Laboratory);
